mapper.select:
SELECT uc.campaign_id, uc.user_id, uc.user_No, u.user_nm, u.phone_Num, c.campaign_title, c.company_nm, c.company_ph, c.applicants_Num, c.recruitment_Num, uc.status, (CASE WHEN c.type_code = '01' THEN '경호' WHEN c.type_code = '02' THEN '진행' WHEN c.type_code = '03' THEN '수행' ELSE '' END) as type_nm, (CASE WHEN uc.status = '0' THEN '대기' WHEN uc.status = '1' THEN '출근' WHEN uc.status = '2' THEN '퇴근' WHEN uc.status = '3' THEN '지각' WHEN uc.status = '4' THEN '결근' WHEN uc.status = '5' THEN '무단' ELSE '없음' END) as status_nm, uc.user_no, c.app_period_str, c.app_period_end, c.event_Period_str, c.event_Period_End, result_date, apply_date, place_addr, file_path FROM user_campaign uc LEFT OUTER JOIN user u ON uc.user_id = u.user_id LEFT OUTER JOIN campaign c ON uc.campaign_id = c.campaign_id LEFT OUTER JOIN files f ON uc.user_no = f.target_id AND f.target_type='profile' AND f.is_deleted = 'N' WHERE uc.campaign_id=#{id}
AND DATE(apply_date) = #{applyDate} AND uc.is_deleted = 'N'
SELECT DISTINCT CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(apply_date, '%Y-%m-%d'), ' 00:00:00') as apply_date FROM user_campaign WHERE campaign_id = #{campaignId} AND is_deleted = 'N'
SELECT status FROM user_campaign WHERE campaign_id = #{campaignId} AND user_no = #{userNo} AND apply_date = #{applyDate} AND is_deleted = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET pay = COALESCE(pay, 0) + (select campaign_pay from campaign where campaign_id = #{campaignId}) WHERE id = #{userNo} AND is_deleted = 'N'
UPDATE user SET pay = COALESCE(pay, 0) + (select campaign_pay from campaign where campaign_id = #{campaignId}) WHERE id = #{userNo} AND is_deleted = 'N'
UPDATE user_campaign SET Status = 0, late_yn = 'N' WHERE campaign_id = #{campaignId} AND user_no = #{userNo} AND apply_date = #{applyDate} AND is_deleted = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Point_History( user_Id, amount, point_Type, source_id, mission_date ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{amount}, #{pointType}, #{sourceId}, #{missionDate})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_campaign SET late_yn = 'Y' WHERE campaign_id = #{campaignId} AND user_no = #{userNo} AND apply_date = #{applyDate} AND is_deleted = 'N'

UPDATE user SET point_full = COALESCE(point_full, 0) + 10000 WHERE id = #{userNo} AND is_deleted = 'N'
INSERT INTO Point_History ( user_Id, amount, point_Type, source_id, mission_date ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{amount}, #{pointType}, #{sourceId}, #{missionDate} )
